not sure i enjoy this pvp meta now
doesnt seem like theres much strategy anymore, its just who can heal more most of the time
lotan thais still works
and horla nymph
and then theres also a bunch of agrippa running around
ill just play dive now, you guys can mess around in pvp
still better than wipe in 3t or less last season
gameplay just tend to get slow so heal has more value
before healing is not considered op cause you can just one tap anyway from full health
nah theres just too much unviable rn
and only a few key units that work too well in their comps
some units and playstyles are just dead rn
and the other teams that didnt get nerfed as badly and used to get countered by the above are now running around
but the comps now still counter the stuff they did before so like instead of rps you removed rock and now scissors is beating paper with nothing to stop it

when is said theres no strategy, its cause there literally isnt if you dont need to think about whether opponent will snipe, or otk early, and can just turn brain off play horla nymph most of the time

ofc theres other stuff you need to watch for but its a lot less if the core combo is sitting in places nobody can reach early

there is just simply not a lot of stuff that can hold against current meta, so people are forced into narrower options
havent seen 2/3rds of the roster since the update

and the give enemy arithmetica posse is bad tempo-wise. they can use it right away. you have to wait a turn. it would be more balanced if in addition to gaining 1 arithmetica limit, it gave the caster 1 mana on use.

wanted to try a similar deck but didnt think of letting reunion copy the ramona card

reunion doesnt get copied if another card has already been played since receiving it
so it needs to be the reunion first before any skills
or the system will classify the ramona copy as a true ally skill?
looks expensive
have you tried horla sr for these
can dupe ramona copy that way too

reunion is a base skill initially
after *any* skill, the next dupe will count for the ally skill used, not base reunion
similar to tinct/faint take shape of last opponent skill
though arguably more powerful if the opponent ends with a more useful skill to dupe
ramona makes up for all arithmetica at turn 4 (no arith boost)
cup wheel feels rng sometimes
kill is usually 3 corpo storms (6 arith) with bonus dmgs
tho with some smart maneuvering can play both cup and horla sr
